data.title: Russia surges ahead in Bitcoin mining amid Trump-Era tariffs and U.S. cost pressures
data.description:
8-5-2025 – Russia has emerged as a primary beneficiary of Bitcoin mining revenues, propelled by new trade policies under U. S. President Donald Trump. The imposition of hefty tariffs—25% on imports from Canada and Mexico, and 10% on Chinese goods—has reshaped economic dynamics, inadvertently bolstering Russia’s position in the crypto-mining sector
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/russia-surges-ahead-in-bitcoin-mining-amid-trump-era-tariffs-and-u-s-cost-pressures/

data.title: Vivek Ramaswamy’s Strive makes bold move as first NASDAQ Bitcoin treasury company
data.description:
Strive Asset Management has agreed to merge with Asset Entities Inc. , setting the stage for a bold transition into a Bitcoin-focused treasury company. According to a May 7 statement, the deal will see the combined firm operate under the Strive name and continue trading on NASDAQ
source: https://cryptoslate.com/vivek-ramaswamys-strive-makes-bold-move-as-first-nasdaq-bitcoin-treasury-company/

data.title: Movement Labs Transitions to Move Industries, Led by New Leadership Team
data.description:
TL;DR Movement Labs has decided to sever ties with Rushi Manche, the company’s co-founder, due to controversy over undisclosed agreements. Manche’s termination was preceded by the delisting of the MOVE token from Coinbase, following concerns about lack of transparency and governance. In a new phase, the project has been reorganized under the name Move Industries,. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/movement-labs-transitions-to-move-industries-led-by-new-leadership-team/

data.title: Uber Earnings Rise By 14% In Q1 With Strong Growth In Trips
data.description:
Catenaa, Wednesday, May 07, 2025- Uber Technologies posted revenue growth of 14% year over year in the first quarter with gross bookings reaching $42 billion but below market expectation.
